strict_gate_json.AUTHORITATIVE_JOIN_KEY_RULE: Per closed trade: trade_key from unified alpaca_exit_attribution (or derived from open_{SYM}_{entry_ts} trade_id + exit row side). Expand aliases using undirected canonical_trade_id_intent <-> canonical_trade_id_fill edges from run.jsonl so trade_intent(entered) keyed at intent-time still joins to fill-time keys. Do not use a single per-symbol 'latest fill' as the join key (multiple positions per symbol would collide).
